name: primecli
description: CLI 程序，用于 Agent（OpenCode / Claude Code / HermesAgent / Codex 等）与 PrimeContact 系统交互。

scripts.format: prettier --write README.md README_CN.md package.json eslint.config.js src scripts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md README_CN.md package.json eslint.config.js src scripts
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run lint && node scripts/smoke-test.mjs
